profileAttributes.title: Manager Email
profileAttributes.description: Primary manager's email. Consumed by future Mover/Leaver flows.

profileAttributes.title: Role Title
profileAttributes.description: Human-readable role title (e.g., 'Senior Software Engineer'). Preserves Auth0 user_metadata.role_title contract; kept separate from Okta base 'title' to avoid collision.

profileAttributes.title: Start Date
profileAttributes.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Preserves Auth0 user_metadata.start_date contract.

groups.name: Data
groups.description: Auto-membership via rule-dept-data. Source of truth for downstream Data access.

groups.name: access-gws
groups.description: Members receive a Google Workspace / Cloud Identity account via Okta SCIM provisioning. Manual membership (not rule-driven).
